overall.description: Third-person Unreal Engine 5 gameplay footage showing a female character exploring a desert canyon environment with red rock formations. The character walks along rocky ridges and through dry brush terrain under bright midday sun, with large mesas and cliff walls visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon ridge with steep cliff drop-off

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky ridge beside a steep cliff, looking out over the canyon valley

entered.detail: tall red rock cliff face rising vertically on the left side of the frame
deep canyon ravine dropping off to the right with rocky slopes below
flat-topped rock formation visible on the horizon against the sky
reddish-brown rocky ground with scattered stones and boulders

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking along a desert canyon ridge. A massive cliff wall rises on the left while a steep valley drops away to the right. The terrain is rocky and arid, with a distant mesa visible on the horizon under bright sunlight.

events.description: terrain shifts from cliff edge to rocky hillside with large scattered boulders
ground cover transitions from bare rock to dry grass and brush patches

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky hillside, navigating between large boulders and dry vegetation

entered.detail: large reddish rock boulders scattered across the hillside
patches of brown dry grass and small shrubs on the rocky slope

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a rocky hillside covered with scattered boulders and patches of dry grass. The cliff wall recedes into the background as the terrain becomes more open, with the distant mesa still visible on the left horizon.

events.description: returns to rocky terrain near cliff base with large rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking along a path through dry brush with large rock formations on the left side

entered.detail: base of the large cliff formation with sloping rock debris
smaller rock formations and outcroppings along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through dry brush vegetation along the base of the cliff wall. Large rock outcroppings appear on the left as the path winds through the desert terrain, with an open valley visible ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert canyon ridge that gradually transitions from a narrow cliffside path to an open valley floor. It begins by following a character walking between a massive rising cliff wall and a steep drop-off, with a distant mesa anchored on the horizon under bright sunlight. As the character ascends a rocky hillside, the cliff wall recedes into the background and the terrain opens up among scattered boulders and patches of dry grass. The scene then shifts as the character descends to walk through dry brush vegetation at the base of the cliffs, where large rock outcroppings emerge on the left. Finally, the path winds through the arid landscape before opening toward a wide, distant valley.
